title: Pollen Micro City
description: A single-image package presenting a pollen grain as a monumental SEM landscape without leaving the language of scientific microscopy.
creative_direction: Single grayscale SEM micrograph focused on specimen realism and scale cues; no fantasy illustration, no color poster treatment, no multi-panel layout.

en.title: Pollen Micro City
en.description: A single-image package presenting a pollen grain as a monumental SEM landscape without leaving the language of scientific microscopy.

zh-CN.title: 花粉微型城市
zh-CN.description: 一个单图包，把花粉粒呈现成具有纪念碑尺度的 SEM 地形，同时保持科学显微摄影语言。
